/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/GestaoEncomendas.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GestaoEncomendas.dir/src/controller/Sistema.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GestaoEncomendas.dir/src/domain/sources/Cliente.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GestaoEncomendas.dir/src/domain/sources/Deposito.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GestaoEncomendas.dir/src/domain/sources/Encomenda.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GestaoEncomendas.dir/src/domain/sources/Veiculo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GestaoEncomendas.dir/src/repository/sources/ClienteRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GestaoEncomendas.dir/src/repository/sources/DepositoRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GestaoEncomendas.dir/src/repository/sources/EncomendaRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GestaoEncomendas.dir/src/repository/sources/VeiculoRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GestaoEncomendas.dir/src/service/Recomendacao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GestaoEncomendas.dir/src/View/sources/MenuprincipalView.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GestaoEncomendas.dir/src/View/sources/ClienteView.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GestaoEncomendas.dir/src/View/sources/AdministradorView.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GestaoEncomendas.dir/src/View/sources/UtilsView.cpp.o -o GestaoEncomendas
